value.found_quote: **`/planning`**       | Configurations | —                          | Enable multi-turn plan generation mode for complex engineering tasks.
value.rationale: The page's CLI reference table explicitly lists the `/planning` command under the "Core slash commands" section, describing its purpose as "Enable multi-turn plan generation mode for complex engineering tasks." This directly substantiates the claim that Antigravity (Google's tool) supports a planning mode that generates multi-turn plans for complex engineering tasks. The feature is listed as a standard command with no preview/beta/deprecated qualifier.
